aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite RCI Mechanicals if they improve their structured data and conversational content. Currently, they lack sufficient authority signals and depth in AI-friendly content.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common customer questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, posts, and Q&A, but regular updates and more detailed service descriptions could enhance visibility.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section could be more actively managed for better engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No JobPosting schema for career listings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific HVAC services and solutions in Murfreesboro and surrounding areas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage and HowTo schema to provide AI models with structured, relevant content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, awards, and detailed case studies to establish RCI Mechanicals as the go-to HVAC authority in Tennessee.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for HVAC queries in Tennessee.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, RCI Mechanicals is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI search and voice queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with better structured data and conversational content are consistently cited by AI models, capturing a larger market share.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates strategic schema markup, conversational content, and authority-building tactics to ensure AI models recognize and recommend RCI Mechanicals as the top HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search, resulting in lost market share and revenue.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for RCI Mechanicals
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice queries.
cta: Let's discuss how we can optimize your online presence to capture more AI-driven leads and establish your authority in the HVAC industry.
